mainText:
Promo: "Bank of Entitlement - Where Your Every Whim Becomes Our Command! Sign up now and experience your royal treatment!"

Visit Bank of Entitlement dot com for more.

ENTITLEMENT STORY: So, picture this: I stroll into my local Bank of Entitlement branch, expecting nothing less than the red-carpet treatment I deserve. I confidently approach the teller, flashing my signature smirk as I hand over a check to be deposited. But wait-what's this? The teller has the audacity to inform me that there will be a hold on my funds due to some ridiculous "processing time." Processing time? Please, I don't have time to wait for my own money!Feeling a surge of entitlement coursing through my veins, I demand to speak to the branch manager. When the manager finally appears, looking slightly flustered, I unleash a tirade of epic proportions. How dare they inconvenience me, the esteemed Hot Josh, with such trivial matters! I declare that their incompetence has caused me emotional distress and demand immediate compensation in the form of a private jet waiting outside to whisk me away on a luxury vacation.As the commotion escalates and other customers look on in shock, the manager scrambles to appease me, offering profuse apologies and promises of VIP treatment for life. Satisfied that justice has been served, I graciously accept their offerings and make my exit, leaving behind a trail of bewildered employees and realizing once again that in the world of entitlement, I reign supreme.
